evidence.text: Global Managing Director of JAKALA's Data and AI Business Line. "It was model trustworthiness inside multi-step agentic workflows at enterprise scale." External pressures compounded the internal one. Generative AI engines were displacing traditional search as the way customers find brands, and JAKALA’s clients had no established way to measure brand visibility inside those AI engines. At the same time, the economics of labor intensive delivery were tightening. "If we did not evolve our delivery model from labor-intensive execution to AI-augmented service, our ability to keep investing in higher-value work for clients would erode," sai
